scripts.dev: concurrently -n gateway,relay,worker,frontend -c blue,red,yellow,green "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:relay" "npm run dev:worker" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build:relay && npm run build:gateway && npm run build:frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd apps/trapchat && npm install
scripts.health: curl -sf http://localhost:8080/health && echo ' gateway ok' ; curl -sf http://localhost:9001/health && echo ' relay ok' ; curl -sf http://localhost:9100/health && echo ' worker ok'
